impact: This removes the blocked checklist item from daemon task selection while preserving completed work and gives the worker a deterministic next recovery step that directly addresses the importlib/dataclass failure without broad rewrites or live automation.
summary: Park the repeatedly failing missing-information validator as deferred broad work and append a narrower no-dataclass recovery task that the daemon can select after the existing fixture prerequisites.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-59: Add the missing-information output validator in the smallest possible Python module after the import test and four-item fixture pass, proving source backing, deduplication, action classification, and private-value rejection.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
